modules.module_title: Macrame & Weaving Ka Parichay aur Samagri (Introduction to Macrame & Weaving, Materials & Tools)
Macrame Ke Buniyadi Knots (Basic Macrame Knots)
Saral Macrame Projects aur Finishing (Simple Macrame Projects & Finishing)
Weaving Ka Parichay aur Loom Setup (Introduction to Weaving & Loom Setup)
Project Planning, Finishing aur Vyaparik Pehlu (Project Planning, Finishing & Business Aspects)

questions.question: Macrame kis kala ka naam hai jismein knots ka upyog hota hai?
questions.explanation: Macrame ek knot-tying art form hai jismein alag-alag tarah ke knots ka istemal karke designs banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Macrame ke liye kaun sa tool sabse zaroori hai knots banane ke liye?
questions.explanation: Macrame mein knots banane ke liye primary material cords ya ropes hi hote hain, inke bina macrame possible nahi hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein, jo thread warp threads ke perpendicular direction mein jaati hai, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Weaving mein, warp threads vertically set hote hain aur weft threads unke perpendicular (horizontally) pass kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Macrame ke liye kaun sa cord type sabse common aur versatile mana jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Cotton cord macrame ke liye sabse popular hai kyunki yeh soft hota hai, knots acche se hold karta hai aur easily available hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein 'warp' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Wo thread jo horizontally pass hoti hai
options.B: Wo thread jo loom par vertically stretched hoti hai
options.C: Wo tool jo threads ko beat karta hai
options.D: Wo pattern jo weaving se banta hai

questions.explanation: Warp threads wo hote hain jo loom par vertically ya lengthwise stretch kiye jaate hain aur weaving ka base banate hain.

questions.question: Ek accha macrame cord kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Knots ko acche se hold kare

questions.explanation: Ek acche macrame cord ki khaas baat ye hai ki wo knots ko firmly hold kare taaki design intact rahe.

questions.question: Synthetic cords (jaise nylon) ki ek khaas property kya hai jo natural cords (jaise cotton) mein nahi hoti?
questions.explanation: Synthetic cords typically water resistant aur zyada durable hote hain, jo unhe outdoor projects ke liye ideal banata hai, jabki natural cords mein yeh gun kam hote hain.

questions.question: Macrame mein knots banane ke liye kya use karte hain?
questions.explanation: Macrame primarily haath se kiya jaata hai, jismein fingers ka upyog karke cords ko knot kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein 'weft' ka kya role hota hai?
questions.explanation: Weft threads warp threads ke upar aur neeche se pass hokar fabric mein design, color aur texture add karte hain.

questions.question: Measuring tape kis kaam aata hai macrame mein?

options.A: Cords ko cut karne ke liye
options.B: Knots ko tight karne ke liye
options.C: Cords ki length measure karne ke liye
options.D: Project ko hang karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Measuring tape ka upyog cords ki sahi length measure karne ke liye hota hai taaki project mein consistency aur accuracy bani rahe.

questions.question: Jute cord ka macrame mein ek disadvantage kya ho sakta hai as compared to cotton?

options.C: Rough aur haathon par harsh ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Jute cord generally cotton se zyada rough aur stiff hota hai, jo lambe samay tak kaam karne par haathon par harsh ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Cotton cord ke environmental benefit kya hai?
questions.explanation: Cotton ek natural fiber hai aur biodegradable hota hai, isliye yeh environmentally friendly option hai.

questions.question: Dowel rod ka upyog macrame mein kya hai?

options.C: Macrame project ko support dena aur hang karna

questions.explanation: Dowel rod ya branch ka upyog macrame wall hangings aur dusre projects ko mount karne aur support dene ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Loom ke bina kya weaving possible hai?

options.B: Haan, backstrap weaving jaise techniques mein

questions.explanation: Haan, loom ke bina bhi weaving possible hai, jaise ki backstrap loom, finger weaving ya cardboard loom jaise improvised methods se.

questions.question: Recycled cotton cords ka use karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.D: Sirf limited colors mein milte hain

questions.explanation: Recycled cotton cords ka upyog karne se waste kam hota hai aur yeh sustainable practice hai, jo unhe environment friendly banata hai.

questions.question: Scissors ka kya kaam hai macrame aur weaving mein?

options.B: Cords aur yarns ko cut karne ke liye
options.C: Project ko hold karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Scissors ek basic aur essential tool hai cords aur yarns ko sahi length mein cut karne aur finishing ke liye.

questions.question: Macrame aur Weaving mein common safety precaution kya hai?

options.B: Sharp tools (jaise scissors) ko carefully handle karna

questions.explanation: Sharp tools jaise scissors aur needles ko carefully handle karna zaroori hai taaki chot na lage.

questions.question: Lark's Head Knot ka dusra naam kya hai, jab ise kisi rod ya ring par attach karte hain?
questions.explanation: Lark's Head Knot ko aksar Cow Hitch bhi kaha jaata hai jab ise kisi base par attach kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek basic Square Knot banane ke liye kitne working cords chahiye?
questions.explanation: Square Knot banane ke liye do working cords aur do filler cords (jo center mein rehte hain) ki zaroorat hoti hai. Total 4 cords, but 2 working cords.

questions.question: Half Hitch Knot kis direction mein banaya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Half Hitch Knots ko alag-alag directions mein banaya ja sakta hai, jaise vertical, horizontal aur diagonal lines banane ke liye.

questions.question: Double Half Hitch Knot ka main use kya hai macrame mein?

options.B: Lines aur shapes banane ke liye
options.C: Cords ko cut karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Double Half Hitch Knot ka upyog aksar clean lines, curves aur detailed shapes banane ke liye hota hai, jaise leaves ya feathers mein.

questions.question: Alternating Square Knot se kya design banta hai?
questions.explanation: Alternating Square Knots se ek flat, dense pattern banta hai jo brickwork jaisa dikhta hai, jismein knots ek dusre ke beech mein set hote hain.

questions.question: Gathering Knot ko aur kis naam se jaana jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Gathering Knot ko Wrapping Knot bhi kehte hain kyunki isme ek cord ko dusre cords ke group ke around wrap kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Reverse Lark's Head Knot ka upyog kahan hota hai?

options.A: Knots ko loose karne ke liye
options.B: Ek clean edge ya base banane ke liye
options.D: Cords ko permanently join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Reverse Lark's Head Knot ka upyog project ke bottom edge par ek clean aur finished look dene ke liye kiya jaata hai, jahan se fringe shuru hoti hai.

questions.question: Square Knot ki do main parts kya hain?

options.A: Left Half Knot aur Right Half Knot

questions.explanation: Ek complete Square Knot do Half Knots se milkar banta hai – ek left-facing Half Knot aur ek right-facing Half Knot.

questions.question: Vertical Double Half Hitch Knot se kya banaya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Vertical Double Half Hitch Knot ka upyog vertical lines, ribs aur texture create karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Lark's Head Knot ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Cords ko ek base (dowel/ring) se attach karna

questions.explanation: Lark's Head Knot sabse basic attachment knot hai, jiska upyog cords ko dowel rod, ring ya kisi dusre base par attach karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Advanced macrame patterns mein knots ko read karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Knots ke symbols aur diagrams ko samajhna
options.D: Kisi bhi knot ko randomly banana

questions.explanation: Advanced patterns mein, knots ke specific symbols aur diagrams ko padhna aur samajhna zaroori hota hai taaki sahi knot sequence aur placement follow ki ja sake.

questions.question: Spiral effect banane ke liye kaun sa knot use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Jab Half Square Knot (yani Square Knot ka sirf ek half) ko repeatedly banaya jaata hai, toh cords twist hokar ek spiral pattern banate hain.

questions.question: Half Knot kya hota hai?

options.B: Square Knot ka sirf ek half

questions.explanation: Half Knot Square Knot ka adha hissa hota hai, jise repeatedly banane par spiral effect milta hai.

questions.question: Jab hum Square Knot ko repeatedly banate hain, toh kya banta hai?

options.B: Ek flat, dense bar ya column

questions.explanation: Repeated Square Knots ek flat, dense column ya bar banate hain, jo macrame ke kai designs ka base hota hai.

questions.question: Multiple cords ko ek saath secure karne aur ek neat finish dene ke liye sabse best knot kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: Gathering Knot (ya Wrapping Knot) ka upyog kai cords ko ek saath bundle karne aur ek clean, secure finish dene ke liye kiya jaata hai, jaise tassels ke top par.

questions.question: Macrame mein knots tight hone chahiye ya loose?
questions.explanation: Macrame mein knots evenly tight hone chahiye taaki project mein consistency, structure aur neatness bani rahe.

questions.question: Horizontal Double Half Hitch Knot ka use kya hai?

options.B: Horizontal lines aur bars banane ke liye
options.C: Cords ko join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Horizontal Double Half Hitch Knot ka upyog macrame projects mein horizontal lines, bars aur intricate patterns banane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Ek simple macrame keychain banane ke liye kaun sa knot sabse commonly use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Simple keychains mein Square Knot aur Half Square Knot (spiral banane ke liye) bahut common hain kyunki yeh basic aur effective hote hain.

questions.question: Macrame plant hanger banane ke liye kaun si cheez zaroori hai, jismein pot rakha jaata hai?

options.B: Ek metal ring ya wooden hoop

questions.explanation: Plant hanger ke bottom mein ek ring ya hoop ka upyog kiya jaata hai jismein plant pot ko support milta hai.

questions.question: Macrame projects mein fringe banane ke liye cords ke ends ke saath kya karte hain?

options.C: Unhe untwist ya brush out kar dete hain

questions.explanation: Fringe banane ke liye cords ke ends ko untwist kiya jaata hai aur phir brush se comb karke soft aur fluffy banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Tassel banane ke liye cords ko kaise arrange karte hain?

options.B: Ek bundle mein, upar se secure karke

questions.explanation: Tassel banane ke liye cords ko ek saath bundle kiya jaata hai aur phir Gathering Knot se top par secure kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Macrame wall hanging mein dowel rod ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Knots ko tight karne ke liye
options.B: Macrame cords ko attach karne aur project ko hang karne ke liye
options.C: Cords ko color karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dowel rod macrame wall hanging ka base hota hai, jisse cords attach hote hain aur pura project hang kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Small macrame coaster banane ke liye kaun sa basic knot use hota hai jo flat surface banata hai?
questions.explanation: Square Knot aur Alternating Square Knot ka upyog flat, dense patterns banane ke liye hota hai jo coasters ke liye perfect hain.

questions.question: Ek bade macrame project ke liye cord estimation kaise karte hain taaki material waste na ho?

options.B: Ek chhota sample banakar aur fir uske hisab se calculate karke
options.C: Hamesha bahut zyada cord khareed kar

questions.explanation: Ek chhota sample ya mini version banakar usmein use hue cord ki length measure karna sabse accurate tarika hai bade project ke liye cord estimate karne ka.

questions.question: Macrame project ko finish karne ke baad kya karna chahiye taaki woh neat dikhe?

options.A: Cords ko aise hi chhod dena
options.B: Extra cords ko trim karna aur fringe ko comb karna
options.C: Project ko fold karke rakh dena

questions.explanation: Finishing mein extra cords ko trim karna, fringe ko evenly cut karna aur comb karna shamil hai taaki project neat aur professional lage.

questions.question: Beads ko macrame project mein kaise incorporate karte hain?

options.B: Knots ke beech mein cords par slide karke

questions.explanation: Beads ko macrame cords par slide kiya jaata hai aur phir knots se secure kiya jaata hai taaki woh apni jagah par rahein.

questions.question: Fringe ko neat aur straight dikhane ke liye kya use karte hain?
questions.explanation: Fringe ko untangle aur straight karne ke liye ek fine-tooth comb ya pet brush ka upyog kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek plant hanger ki strength kis baat par depend karti hai?

options.B: Knots ki tightness aur material ki quality par
options.D: Hanger ke design ki complexity par

questions.explanation: Plant hanger ki strength uske cords ki quality, knots ki tightness aur consistency par depend karti hai taaki woh pot ka weight safely hold kar sake.

questions.question: Macrame feathers banane ke liye kaun sa knot use hota hai jo unhe leaf-like shape deta hai?
questions.explanation: Macrame feathers banane ke liye ek central cord par chote-chote Lark's Head Knots lagaye jaate hain aur phir unhe comb karke feather shape di jaati hai.

questions.question: Metal ya wooden ring ka upyog macrame mein kya hai?

options.C: Project ke liye base ya attachment point provide karna

questions.explanation: Rings macrame projects jaise plant hangers, mandalas aur dreamcatchers ke liye ek strong base ya attachment point provide karte hain.

questions.question: Macrame ke knots ko khulne se rokne ke liye kya karte hain, especially ends par?

options.B: Cords ko burn ya glue se seal karte hain
options.D: Unhe paani mein bhigo dete hain

questions.explanation: Synthetic cords ko heat-seal kiya ja sakta hai, aur natural cords ke ends ko glue ya ek chota overhand knot laga kar secure kiya ja sakta hai taaki woh khulein nahi.

questions.question: Ek complex macrame design ko plan karte samay sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Seedha knots banana shuru kar dena
options.B: Design sketch karna aur cord calculation karna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi complex project ko shuru karne se pehle design sketch karna, knots ki sequence plan karna aur cord requirements calculate karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Tassel ko secure karne ke liye kaun sa knot use hota hai taaki woh apni jagah par rahe?
questions.explanation: Gathering Knot (ya Wrapping Knot) ka upyog tassel ke top par cords ko tightly bundle karne aur secure karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Macrame project mein consistency maintain karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Har knot ko ek hi tightness aur size mein banana
options.D: Sirf ek hi type ka knot use karna

questions.explanation: Consistency ka matlab hai ki har knot ko same tightness, size aur spacing ke saath banaya jaaye taaki pura project uniform dikhe.

questions.question: Weaving mein do main sets of threads kya hain?
questions.explanation: Weaving mein, warp threads loom par vertically set hote hain aur weft threads unke horizontally pass kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Warp threads ko loom par kaise rakhte hain?
questions.explanation: Warp threads loom par vertically aur evenly spaced stretch kiye jaate hain, jo weaving ka foundation banate hain.

questions.question: Frame loom kaisa dikhta hai?
questions.explanation: Frame loom ek basic rectangular ya square frame hota hai jismein warp threads ko stretch kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Warp threads ko tension mein rakhna kyun zaroori hai weaving mein?

options.A: Taaki weft threads loose ho jaayein
options.C: Taaki weft threads smoothly pass hon aur fabric evenly bune

questions.explanation: Warp threads ko proper tension mein rakhna zaroori hai taaki weft threads smoothly pass ho sakein aur fabric evenly aur consistently bune.

questions.question: Weft threads ko warp threads ke beech se pass karne ke liye kis tool ka upyog hota hai, especially frame loom par?
questions.explanation: Shuttle ya weaving needle ka upyog weft yarn ko warp threads ke beech se efficiently pass karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Shed' ka kya matlab hai weaving mein?

options.A: Wo jagah jahan looms rakhe jaate hain
options.B: Warp threads ke do layers ke beech ka opening

questions.explanation: Shed warp threads ke beech mein banaya gaya opening hota hai, jiske through weft thread pass kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Rigid heddle loom, frame loom se kaise different hai, especially functionality ke maamle mein?

options.A: Rigid heddle loom mein warp threads ko manually upar neeche karna padta hai
options.B: Rigid heddle loom mein shed apne aap ban jaata hai
options.C: Rigid heddle loom bahut chhota hota hai
options.D: Rigid heddle loom sirf round shapes banata hai

questions.explanation: Rigid heddle loom mein ek heddle hota hai jo warp threads ko automatic upar aur neeche lift karke shed banata hai, jisse weaving process faster ho jaati hai, jabki frame loom mein yeh manual hota hai.

questions.question: Warp thread ke liye kaun sa yarn type prefer kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Warp threads ko strong aur non-stretchy hona chahiye taaki weaving ke dauran woh tension ko withstand kar sakein aur break na hon.

questions.question: Loom par warp threads ko evenly space karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Taaki fabric mein gaps aa jaayein
options.C: Taaki fabric evenly aur balanced bane

questions.explanation: Evenly spaced warp threads se fabric evenly aur balanced banta hai, aur design mein consistency aati hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein 'beater' ka kya kaam hai?

options.C: Weft threads ko warp threads ke against pack karna

questions.explanation: Beater (ya comb) ka upyog weft threads ko tightly pack karne ke liye hota hai taaki fabric dense aur evenly bune.

questions.question: Ek bade tapestry weaving project ke liye kaun sa loom best rahega, jismein complex designs aur fine details hon?
questions.explanation: Tapestry loom ya floor loom bade aur intricate tapestry projects ke liye ideal hote hain, kyunki woh stable hote hain aur fine control provide karte hain.

questions.question: Weft yarn ko warp ke upar aur neeche se pass karne ki process ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Picking (ya passing the weft) weft yarn ko shed ke through pass karne ki process hai, jo weaving ka core step hai.

questions.question: Weaving ki sabse basic aur common technique kya hai?
questions.explanation: Plain weave, jise Tabby weave bhi kehte hain, weaving ki sabse basic technique hai jismein weft thread har alternate warp thread ke upar aur neeche se pass hota hai.

questions.question: Warp threads ko loom par 'warping' karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.C: Warp threads ko loom par evenly stretch aur set karna

questions.explanation: Warping ka matlab hai warp threads ko loom par properly measure karke, evenly space karke aur tension ke saath set karna.

questions.question: Different types of warp yarns ke tension requirements kaise vary karte hain?

options.A: Sabhi yarns ko same tension chahiye
options.B: Thicker yarns ko kam tension chahiye
options.C: Thinner yarns ko zyada tension chahiye
options.D: Yarn type, fiber content aur thickness ke hisab se tension vary karta hai

questions.explanation: Har yarn type ki apni elasticity aur strength hoti hai, isliye unhe optimum tension par rakhne ke liye alag-alag adjustments ki zaroorat padti hai.

questions.question: Small weaving projects jaise coasters ya wall hangings ke liye kaun sa loom sabse convenient hai?
questions.explanation: Frame loom ya cardboard loom chhote projects ke liye portable, easy to set up aur cost-effective hote hain.

questions.question: Warp threads ko loom par kahan secure karte hain?

options.C: Top aur bottom dono ends par

questions.explanation: Warp threads ko loom ke top aur bottom edges par securely attach kiya jaata hai taaki woh tension mein rahein aur stable base provide karein.

questions.question: Plain weave ko aur kis naam se jaana jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Plain weave, jismein weft thread har alternate warp ke upar aur neeche se jaata hai, ko Tabby weave bhi kehte hain.

questions.question: Plain weave mein weft thread kaise pass hota hai?

options.A: Har do warp threads ke upar se
options.B: Har alternate warp thread ke upar aur neeche se

questions.explanation: Plain weave mein, weft thread ek warp thread ke upar se aur agle ke neeche se pass hota hai, aur yeh pattern repeat hota hai.

questions.question: Rya knot ka upyog weaving mein kya banane ke liye karte hain?
questions.explanation: Rya knots ka upyog woven pieces mein thick, shaggy fringe ya texture add karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Soumak stitch se weaving mein kya effect milta hai?
questions.explanation: Soumak stitch ek raised, braided texture banata hai jo woven piece mein depth aur visual interest add karta hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein color change kaise karte hain?

options.A: Purane weft thread ko kaat kar naya jodte hain
options.B: Poore loom ko naye color se paint karte hain
options.C: Sirf warp thread ka color change karte hain
options.D: Weaving ke beech mein color change nahi kar sakte

questions.explanation: Color change karne ke liye, current weft thread ko terminate kiya jaata hai aur naye color ke weft thread ko shuru kiya jaata hai, ends ko secure karte hue.

questions.question: Fringe banane ke liye Rya knots ko kahan lagate hain?

options.B: Weaving ke edges par ya bottom par

questions.explanation: Rya knots ko aam taur par woven piece ke bottom edge par lagaya jaata hai taaki ek decorative fringe ban sake.

questions.question: Different textures create karne ke liye weaving mein kaun si technique use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Alag-alag yarn types (thick/thin, smooth/bumpy) aur stitches (Soumak, Rya) ka upyog karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi color use karna

questions.explanation: Alag-alag yarn types (jaise wool, cotton, roving), unki thickness aur vibhinn stitches (jaise Soumak, Rya knots) ka upyog karke diverse textures create kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Plain weave pattern ka example kya hai?
questions.explanation: Simple cotton cloth jaise ki muslin ya basic linen aksar plain weave technique se bante hain.

questions.question: Weaving mein gaps avoid karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Warp threads ko unevenly space karna
options.C: Weft threads ko evenly pack karna
options.D: Sirf ek hi color use karna

questions.explanation: Weft threads ko evenly aur consistently pack karna zaroori hai taaki fabric mein koi gaps na aayein aur woh evenly bune.

questions.question: Weft thread ko warp threads ke beech se pass karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Shuttle ya tapestry needle weft thread ko warp threads ke through pass karne ke liye use ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Tapestry weaving mein intricate designs banane ke liye kis technique ka use hota hai, jismein colors ko blend karte hain?
questions.explanation: Hatching aur blending techniques tapestry weaving mein colors ko smoothly transition karne aur intricate designs create karne ke liye use hoti hain.

questions.question: Weaving mein 'rows' ko evenly space karne ke liye kya karte hain?

options.A: Weft ko randomly pack karte hain
options.B: Beater ya comb se weft ko evenly push karte hain
options.C: Warp ko loose chhod dete hain
options.D: Sirf fingers ka use karte hain

questions.explanation: Beater ya comb ka upyog weft threads ko evenly aur consistently pack karne ke liye hota hai, jisse rows evenly spaced rehti hain.

questions.question: Soumak stitch ka ek basic feature kya hai?

options.B: Yeh warp threads ke around wrap hota hai
options.D: Yeh sirf ek color mein banta hai

questions.explanation: Soumak stitch mein weft yarn warp threads ke around wrap kiya jaata hai, jisse ek raised, braided effect banta hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein warp tension maintain karna kyun critical hai?

options.A: Taaki fabric bahut loose ho jaaye
options.C: Taaki fabric mein distortion na aaye aur woh evenly bune

questions.explanation: Consistent warp tension fabric ko evenly bunne mein मदद karta hai aur distortion (jaise hourglassing) ko prevent karta hai.

questions.question: Ek woven piece mein clean edges banane ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Weft ko consistent tension ke saath edges par tightly lapetana

questions.explanation: Clean edges maintain karne ke liye weft yarn ko har row ke end par consistent tension ke saath carefully turn aur pack karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein 'interlocking' technique ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Do color areas ke beech mein gaps banana
options.C: Do color areas ko seamlessly join karna taaki koi gap na ho
options.D: Sirf ek hi color use karna

questions.explanation: Interlocking technique ka upyog adjacent color areas ke weft threads ko ek dusre ke saath lock karne ke liye hota hai, jisse unke beech mein koi vertical gap nahi banta.

questions.question: Macrame ya weaving project shuru karne se pehle kya plan karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Kisi bhi project ko shuru karne se pehle design, required materials, tools aur steps ko plan karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Finished macrame product (jaise plant hanger) ki care kaise karte hain?

options.C: Halke haathon se spot clean ya hand wash kar ke

questions.explanation: Macrame products ko halke haathon se spot clean karna ya hand wash karna unki shape aur texture ko maintain karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Ek woven piece ko loom se utarne ke baad kya karte hain?

options.A: Seedha use karna shuru kar dete hain
options.B: Warp ends ko secure aur trim karte hain

questions.explanation: Loom se utarne ke baad, warp ends ko knot karke ya weave-in karke secure karna zaroori hai taaki fabric khule nahi.

questions.question: Apne handmade products ko market karne ka ek effective tarika kya hai?

options.B: Social media aur online platforms par showcase karna
options.C: Unhe ghar par chhupa kar rakhna
options.D: Kisi ko bhi free mein de dena

questions.explanation: Social media (Instagram, Facebook) aur online marketplaces (Etsy, Amazon Handmade) handmade products ko promote aur sell karne ke liye effective platforms hain.

questions.question: Product ki price decide karte waqt kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Material cost, labor time aur profit margin

questions.explanation: Product ki price decide karte waqt material cost, usmein laga time (labor), overhead expenses aur ek reasonable profit margin sabhi ko consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Macrame wall hanging ko clean kaise karte hain?

options.B: Vacuum cleaner se ya duster se dust remove karna

questions.explanation: Macrame wall hangings ko regularly dust karna (vacuum cleaner ya duster se) unhe clean rakhne ka sabse accha tarika hai. Spot cleaning bhi kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Material cost estimate karte waqt kya factors consider karne chahiye?

options.B: Cord, dowel, beads, packaging aur shipping materials ka price

questions.explanation: Material cost mein sirf main raw material (cord/yarn) hi nahi, balki dowel rods, rings, beads, packaging supplies aur shipping related materials ka cost bhi include karna chahiye.

questions.question: Handmade products ki packaging kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Attractive, protective aur brand image ke مطابق
options.D: Bade box mein, chahe product chhota ho

questions.explanation: Packaging product ko protect karti hai, brand image ko enhance karti hai aur customer experience ko behtar banati hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback ka kya importance hai apne business ke liye?

options.C: Products aur service ko improve karne ke liye
options.D: Competitors ko copy karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback valuable insights provide karta hai jisse aap apne products, quality aur overall customer service ko improve kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek unique selling proposition (USP) banana kyun zaroori hai apne handmade business ke liye?

options.A: Taaki koi aur copy na kar sake
options.B: Taaki aap apne competitors se alag dikhein aur customers ko attract karein
options.C: Sirf product ka naam unique rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: USP aapke business ko competitors se differentiate karta hai aur customers ko batata hai ki aapke products mein kya khaas hai, jisse woh aapke paas aate hain.

questions.question: Small scale par macrame products bechne ke liye kaun sa online platform use kar sakte hain?

options.B: E-commerce platforms like Etsy, Instagram Shop, Facebook Marketplace

questions.explanation: Etsy, Instagram aur Facebook Marketplace jaise platforms handmade artists ko apne products ko wide audience tak pahunchane mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Project design karte samay kaun se elements par focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Color palette, texture, pattern aur functionality
options.D: Dusre designs ko copy karne par

questions.explanation: Ek successful design ke liye color, texture, pattern, form aur functionality jaise elements ko carefully consider karna chahiye.

questions.question: Apne brand ko social media par promote karne ka sabse effective tareeka kya hai?

options.B: High-quality photos aur videos, consistent posting aur engaging content
options.D: Har post mein bahut saare hashtags use karna

questions.explanation: Consistent high-quality visual content, regular engagement aur relevant hashtags ka upyog social media par brand ko effectively promote karta hai.

questions.question: Quality control macrame aur weaving mein kyun important hai?

options.B: Taaki customer satisfied ho aur repeat business mile

questions.explanation: Quality control ensures ki products high standards meet karein, jisse customer satisfaction badhta hai aur repeat business ki chances bhi badhti hain.

questions.question: Handmade products ke liye pricing strategy mein labor cost ko kaise include karte hain?

options.A: Labor cost ko ignore karte hain
options.B: Har ghante ke hisab se ek rate decide karke total time se multiply karte hain
options.C: Sirf material cost ka 10% add karte hain
options.D: Customer se poochhte hain ki kitna pay kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Labor cost ko accurately calculate karne ke liye, apne time ka ek hourly rate set karein aur us rate ko product banane mein lage total ghanton se multiply karein.

questions.question: Customer ko product ki care instructions dena kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki customer product ko jaldi kharab kar de
options.B: Taaki product ki life badhe aur customer satisfied rahe

questions.explanation: Care instructions dene se customer ko pata chalta hai ki product ko kaise maintain karna hai, jisse uski life badhti hai aur customer satisfaction bhi.
